text:
The Egyptian handball teamwill face its Danish counterpart in theParis 2024 Olympicson Monday, at 3:00 pm Cairo time.

The 33rd edition of the Olympic Games kicked off on Friday, in the French capital and will end on August 11.



Where to watch

The match will be broadcast on the encrypted Qatari beIN Sports channels, the exclusive and sole broadcaster of the Paris 2024 Olympics handball matches, specifically beIN SPORTS 3HD.

It can also be viewed on the TOD smartphone application.



Egyptian handball team matches



The Egyptian handball team



Egypt Handball Team Group at Paris 2024 Olympics

Egypt’s handball team is in Group II along with Denmark, France, Norway, Hungary and Argentina.

The first four teams from the groups qualify for the quarter-finals, which will be held in the knockout system.

Edited translation from Al-Masry Al-Youm
title: When and where to watch Egypt handball team match vs Denmark in Paris Olympics - Egypt Independent
author: Al-Masry Al-Youm
